title: tupa assurgens
intro: Tupa assurgens, also known as the 'Lobelia', is a flowering plant species native to the Andean regions of South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs. The plant contains alkaloids like lobeline, which has been shown to have expectorant properties, helping to relieve congestion and promote mucus discharge. Herbal preparations of Tupa assurgens can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are also used in folk medicine to treat anxiety, insomnia, and other conditions.
